reviews.review_title: not bad but very short, need big room
reviews.review_description: The pub atmosphere is fun. Story is not bad. Not much to do. There's no locomotion, so you'll need a big room to interact / make choices. There's one interaction that requires you to touch the (dirty) floor with your hand/controller, which I'm very much against doing. The devs could've eliminated the big room requirement by implementing force-grabbing like in other games.

I was interested in what they would do with the topic. I expected to be more disturbed by it than I was, but well done story, graphics and voice acting.

I didn't find it as interactive as I thought it would be, partly because the phone kept falling below my boundary where I couldn't reach it. 

Priced right for what you get. Would recommend.

developer_response.body:
Hi Phaenomenal,

Thank you so much for your review, it means a lot to us :)
